key_items: Senate Banking Committee advances CLARITY Act with 15-9 bipartisan vote, clearing major path to full Senate floor passage
Bitcoin surges past $82K on regulatory clarity momentum while institutional demand remains strong via STRC/SATA dividend mechanisms
S&P 500 hits new all-time highs with skyrocketing risk appetite, supporting Bitcoin's recovery above key $80-81K support levels
reasoning: The CLARITY Act advancement represents the most significant bullish catalyst, removing regulatory uncertainty and signaling bipartisan support for crypto market structure legitimacy. Combined with strong institutional inflows through MicroStrategy's STRC and Strive's SATA (daily 13% Bitcoin-backed dividends), and synchronized equity market strength, Bitcoin has multiple tailwinds supporting a $85-86K retest within the 1-7 day swing window.
risks: The $80K breakdown and $1 billion long liquidation trap warning suggest one more shake-out could trigger cascading margin calls; additionally, bearish analysts flagging potential 50-78% crashes and redistribution phase patterns create elevated volatility risk if momentum falters.
